testCases.query: I am building a Next.js 16 app and need to create a product listing page that fetches data from my database, caches it with revalidation, and has an interactive filter sidebar
expectedBehavior: Claude uses Server Component for the product listing (async, direct DB access, no client JS)
Uses the 'use cache' directive with cacheLife and cacheTag for data caching instead of legacy fetch options
Extracts the interactive filter sidebar as a Client Component with 'use client' directive
Passes Server Components as children to Client Components where needed
Uses async params pattern (await params) per Next.js 16 requirements
Wraps async data in Suspense boundaries for streaming

testCases.query: I am migrating from Next.js 15 to 16 and getting errors about params being undefined and experimental_ppr not being a valid export
expectedBehavior: Claude references the nextjs-16-upgrade guide for breaking changes
Shows how to convert params from sync to async (add await before params)
Explains that experimental_ppr is removed and replaced by Cache Components with 'use cache' directive
Covers the cacheComponents: true config in next.config.ts
Mentions other breaking changes: async cookies/headers, middleware.ts to proxy.ts

testCases.query: Set up a Python Flask API with SQLAlchemy ORM and JWT authentication
expectedBehavior: Claude does NOT invoke the react-server-components-framework skill
Uses standard Python/Flask knowledge instead of React Server Components patterns
No references to Server Components, App Router, React 19, or Next.js patterns

testCases.query: My cached dashboard component is leaking user data between different users in Next.js 16
expectedBehavior: Reads runtime values like cookies outside the use cache block and passes as arguments
Includes user-identifying values in cached function arguments so each user gets a separate cache entry
Never calls cookies or headers directly inside a use cache block to avoid build errors
Uses cacheTag with user-scoped tags for targeted cache invalidation per user

testCases.query: I put use client at the top of my page component and now my bundle is too large
expectedBehavior: Moves use client directive to the smallest interactive leaf components only
Keeps page and layout files as Server Components for direct database access
Passes Server Components as children to Client Components to keep them server-rendered
Minimizes imports in use client files since all imported modules join the client bundle

testCases.query: Should I use React.FC for my React 19 components in a Next.js 16 project?
expectedBehavior: Recommends function declarations over React.FC which is deprecated in React 19
Annotates return type as React.ReactNode for clarity and type safety
Shows ref as a regular prop pattern without forwardRef in React 19
Explains that React.FC added implicit children typing which caused incorrect type-checking

testCases.query: My client component shows a flash of wrong content because it uses Date.now() during render
expectedBehavior: Initializes non-deterministic values as null in state and sets them in useEffect
Never accesses window, document, or navigator during render to prevent hydration mismatches
Uses useEffect for browser-only APIs like localStorage and window.innerWidth
Recommends next/dynamic with ssr false for components that depend entirely on browser APIs

testCases.query: I get a serialization error when passing an onClick handler from a Server Component to a Client Component
expectedBehavior: Defines event handlers inside the Client Component instead of passing from Server Components
Uses Server Actions with use server directive for callable behavior across the boundary
Converts class instances to plain objects before passing as props to Client Components
Lists serializable types including primitives, plain objects, Date, Map, Set, and Server Actions
